@graph.name: Decks & Patios - Capitol Improvements
@graph.description: TimberTech Platinum certified contractor building composite, Ipe hardwood, pressure-treated, and rooftop decks in Maryland, DC, and Virginia. Flagstone patios, cable railing, and custom outdoor living spaces.

itemOffered.name: Composite Deck Building
itemOffered.description: TimberTech composite decking — low maintenance, fade resistant, dozens of colors and profiles.

itemOffered.name: Ipe Hardwood Deck Building
itemOffered.description: Premium Brazilian Ipe hardwood decking — one of the hardest and most durable deck materials available.

itemOffered.name: Pressure-Treated Wood Deck Building
itemOffered.description: Traditional pressure-treated pine decking — the most affordable option.

itemOffered.name: Rooftop Deck Construction
itemOffered.description: Rooftop deck systems over flat roofs in urban and rowhouse settings, with integrated waterproofing.

itemOffered.name: Flagstone Patio Installation
itemOffered.description: Natural flagstone patio installation with dry-laid or mortar-set techniques.

itemOffered.name: Cable Railing Installation
itemOffered.description: Stainless steel cable railing systems for modern aesthetics and unobstructed views.
